image:image.image:title: Muhammad Hamza — Software Engineer from Peshawar, Pakistan
image:image.image:caption: Muhammad Hamza, Software Engineer, Main Developer of Quizior, Co-Founder at Solvia Codes, Co-Lead at Nexior.

image:image.image:title: Inside Quizior: How I Built a Free, Real-Time MCQ Quiz Platform
image:image.image:caption: Muhammad Hamza breaks down how Quizior lets you generate up to 100 MCQs instantly, extract 350+ questions from Word/Excel files, and run live, leaderboard-driven quizzes for classrooms and competitions — completely free.
